title: Session 15: Implicit Differentiation and Inverse Functions
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview An important application of implicit differentiation is to finding the derivatives of inverse functions. Here we find a formula for the derivative of an inverse, then apply it to get the derivatives of inverse trigonometric functions.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Derivative of the Inverse of a Function
